name: qa-automation-assessment
description: UI automation with Playwright + performance testing with k6 (reqres.in).

scripts.perf: mkdir -p performance/output && docker run --rm -i -v $(pwd):/work -w /work grafana/k6 run performance/main.js
scripts.perf:ci: mkdir -p performance/output && docker run --rm -i -v $(pwd):/work -w /work grafana/k6 run performance/main.js
